channel.title: Mental
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Mental, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: One trait linked to 28% lower dementia risk
item.description: Research identifies a personality trait as a strong predictor of brain health.

item.title: What makes a SuperAger? Brain study offers clue
item.description: A large-scale brain study reveals a clue about cognitive resilience in older adults.

item.title: Most important sleep habits for longevity
item.description: Experts share three research-backed strategies for deeper, consistent sleep.

item.title: 40-minute workout activates bone-building in women
item.description: Study finds that the benefits accumulate with repeated sessions.
